name: webpart-noframework
description: A basic web part template for SPFx

eslintProfile.description: The ESLint profile from `@microsoft/eslint-config-spfx` to use

libraryName.description: The name of the library (also used as the package name)

versionBadge.description: The version badge URL to use in the README.md

componentId.description: The component ID (GUID) for the web part

componentAlias.description: The component alias (in manifest) for the web part

componentNameUnescaped.description: The component name (in manifest) for the web part, unescaped

componentNameCamelCase.description: The component name (in manifest) for the web part, in camel case

componentNameHypenCase.description: The component name (in manifest) for the web part, in hyphen case

componentClassName.description: The component class name for the web part

componentStrings.description: The component strings module name / webpack alias for the web part
